headline: Reliance Global Group Names CTO From Coinbase and Capital One To Lead AI-Powered Insurance Product Development and Agency Roll-Up Strategy
summary: Appointments of Zack Wilder as CTO, Judah Korman as COO, and Mordy Beyman as Executive Vice President to advance dual strategy: In-house development of planned AI-native insurance products and AI-powered agency acquisition roll-upLAKEWOOD, NJ, June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reliance Global Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: EZRA), an Insurtech company that acquires independent insurance agencies, consolidates them into a unified network, and supports them with a technology platform, today announced the app
